title: Jurassic Era Paint Your Own Dinosaur Painting Kit for Kids
features: Use your imagination to paint your own dinosaurs
Pack includes 1 x brachiosaurus kit and 1 x t-rex kit
Each kit comes with 4 x different colour paints and a paint brush
Includes advice and suggestions for painting
Not suitable for children under the age of 3 years
description: Jurassic Era Pack Of 2 Paint Your Own Dinosaur Kits

specifications_table.Included Components: Dinosaur-shaped canvas (2 pieces), Paints (8 colors), Paint brush (2 pieces), Painting instructions
